voters.name: Dorothy
voters.comment: This one grew on me with a few listens

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: This one is a) a banger, b) an earworm, c) great for the prompt with the card reference. Excellent score.

voters.name: Nate
voters.comment: Bonus point for actual card reference

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Funny that Spotify put this as the last song on the playlist - it's a fun upbeat song to end on, especially coming after Somnus 😅

voters.name: Rose
voters.comment: Wiggles hips

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Top tier album 👌

voters.name: [Left the League]
voters.comment: I am assuming this is Mike, since it is MisterWives. Doesn't mater. I just like to guess. Cool song!

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: MisterWives requirement met. The playlist is officially in compliance. Good closer.

voters.name: [Left the League]
voters.comment: Beautiful. I am a sucker for mournful-hopeful songs, but this particular recording has a sort of tin-y-ness to it I am not a fan of. I found a live recording of the song which doesn't have it and it was great (even considering the potato phone someone was recording on, lol). So, seems to be something to do with their editing for commercial release.

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: A good redemption for MisterWives to me after not feeling the live performance. Now, I'm starting to get concerned that MisterWives may be a weekly feature in our rounds...

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: The choral party 😩👌

songs.name: End Of My Rope (The Aces Remix)

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: We see you Mike, and we support you! (at least I do, because I really liked this)

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: A twofer!

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: 👌👌 a classic

voters.name: [Left the League]
voters.comment: The female lead reminds me of Florence (and the Machine).

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: I like the original well and just feel that this being a live performance didn't serve the cover or my first impressions of MisterWives.

songs.name: the end at the Live Dream

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I'm not crying you're crying 😭

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Mike, you've been making me become a MisterWives fan! Really liked this one. It's giving me Cranberries vibes (sorry if you hate the Cranberries and I've cut you again) (Also sorry if this isn't Mike) I could do without the poem in the beginning personally but I really enjoy the actual song

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I find myself liking the beginning section with the spoken word poetry surprisingly (I'm usually not a huge fan)
